rows.name: APPLE IPHONE 16
rows.short_description: The iPhone 16 is a 5G-enabled, AI-focused smartphone featuring a 48MP Fusion camera with 2x Telephoto capabilities, a new "Camera Control" button, and an Action button replacing the mute switch. It is powered by the fast, efficient A18 chip, designed for improved performance in gaming and Apple Intelligence tasks, with a "big boost" in battery life.
rows.description:
Built for Apple Intelligence: The iPhone 16 uses powerful generative models to simplify daily tasks, with system-wide writing tools, smart Siri, and enhanced photo editing capabilities.
Camera Control Button: A new, dedicated tactile sensor on the side allows users to instantly launch the camera, capture photos/videos, and adjust settings like zoom, exposure, and depth of field by sliding a finger.
Advanced Camera System: The 48MP Fusion main camera provides high-resolution imaging and acts as a 2x optical-quality telephoto lens. A new 12MP Ultra Wide camera with autofocus enables macro photography and gathers 2.6x more light.
A18 Chip Performance: The device features the A18 chip, designed on a 3-nanometer process. It is 30% faster than the A16 Bionic and includes a 5-core GPU that is 40% faster for gaming and hardware-accelerated ray tracing.
Design & Action Button: It features a durable, aerospace-grade aluminum design with five vibrant colors (black, white, pink, teal, ultramarine) and a refined internal design for better heat dissipation. The Action Button, previously on the Pro models, allows for customizable shortcuts.
Battery & Display: The iPhone 16 features a Super Retina XDR display (OLED) with a 2,000-nit peak brightness. The reengineered internal design supports a larger battery and faster 25W MagSafe wireless charging.
Safety Features: The phone includes upgraded satellite capabilities, allowing for SOS, roadside assistance, and messaging when outside of cellular coverage.
